code:
data Item
  name: String
  price: Int
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let cart = [
    Item(name: "apple", price: 120),
    Item(name: "bread", price: 300),
    Item(name: "cheese", price: 480),
  ]
  mut subtotal = 0
  for item in cart
    subtotal = subtotal + item.price
  end
  let discount = if subtotal >= 500
    100
  else
    0
  end
  let total = subtotal - discount
  println("subtotal=#{subtotal}")
  println("total=#{total}")
end
